name: cognitive-annotation
description: Cognitive alignment toolkit: annotation pipeline + real-time suggestion agent

plugins.name: cognitive-annotation
plugins.description: Annotates conversation transcripts with executive function, metacognition, memory & reasoning, and user mental model behaviors

plugins.name: cognitive-agent
plugins.description: Real-time cognitive alignment suggestions — fires at end of each AI response and surfaces a lightweight ≤3-sentence insight shaped by the user's Cognitive Profile snapshot
